---
title: "Recent additions"
subtitle: "New and recently published items, most recent first"
description: >
  What has been added to the archive, ordered by the date each item was
  published here. Returning researchers can scan this page to see what is
  new since their last visit.
listing:
  id: additions
  # Path assumption: this file sits at the site root and item bundles live at
  # archive/<id>/index.qmd. If updates.qmd lives elsewhere, adjust this glob.
  contents: "archive/*/index.qmd"
  type: table
  sort: "date-added desc"          # accession order — newest publication first
  sort-ui: [date-added, date, title]
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date-added, date, title, description]
  field-display-names:
    date-added: "Added"
    date: "Item date"
    title: "Item"
    description: "Description"
  feed: true                       # emits updates.xml so scholars can subscribe
  categories: false
toc: false
---

Items appear here in the order they were **added to the archive** — newest first —
which is not the same as the date of the document itself. A document written in
1994 may have been published here only recently. If you have visited before, scan
the **Added** column for anything new since.

For the full collection arranged in historical order, see [the Archive](/archive/index.qmd).

::: {#additions}
:::

To be notified when new items are published, subscribe to the
[updates feed](updates.xml).
